component.name: Linux Capture Studio
component.summary: Native Linux capture, lossless recording, and HDR studio

description.p: Linux Capture Studio provides a native GTK and GStreamer workflow for compatible V4L2 and UVC capture devices.
It includes staged mode changes, lossless recording, independent monitored audio, device profiles, and HDR workflows. YouTube and Twitch integration are marked as coming soon.
Requires real-frame rollback confirmation and applies HDR preview correction/calibration live without reopening the GC575 transport.
Persistent GC575 4K transition window, node-only reset helper, and stabilized native 4K MJPEG watchdog.
Bounds GC575 startup recovery, commits recovery only after a real frame, and performs one safe 1080p60 fallback instead of retrying a rejected mode indefinitely.

Fixes dark HDR previews with source-aware transfer handling: genuine P010 uses PQ/HLG mapping, while native 4K MJPEG and other 8-bit sources use display-referred compensation without an incorrect PQ decode.
GC575 native 4K transition safety, first-frame Apply validation, complete last-good rollback, console-style HDR calibration, and movable Settings window.
Built-in HDR preview calibration, movable settings window, and native-resolution HDR60 sessions.
HDR preview correction, Flatpak packaging, and release-candidate polish.
